meta.title: FuelGuide — The right fuel for your machine
meta.description: Search by brand and model to instantly find out what fuel your lawn mower, chainsaw, or leaf blower needs.
meta.machine_description: What fuel does the {brand} {model} need? Find out here.

hero.title: What fuel does your machine need?
hero.subtitle: Search by brand and model — instant answer, free.
hero.search_placeholder: e.g. Honda HRG 416 or Stihl MS 250

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.step1_text: Type the brand and model of your machine in the search bar.
how_it_works.step2_text: We tell you exactly what fuel you need.
how_it_works.step3_text: Click through to the shop and order directly.

fuel_advice.uses_mix: Mix petrol with 2-stroke oil at ratio {ratio}
